title: Transformers: Combiner Wars
synopsis: Set forty years after the Great War, the fragile peace on Cybertron is shattered when the Enigma of Combination creates powerful Combiner warriors. Windblade, a warrior from Caminus, travels to Cybertron to confront the Council — Starscream, Rodimus Prime, and the Mistress of Flame — who plan to weaponize the Enigma. As Combiners clash across the planet, Starscream reveals his true scheme: to absorb the Combiners and become the ultimate lifeform. Only an unlikely alliance between Optimus Prime, Megatron, and Windblade can stop him.

episodes.title: The Fall
episodes.synopsis: On Caminus, the Autobot Combiner Computron battles the Decepticon Combiner Menasor. After Menasor's defeat at the hands of Windblade, his dying words warn of a plot to create a Combiner army.

episodes.title: The Council
episodes.synopsis: The Council of Cybertron debates the Combiner threat and whether to use the Enigma of Combination. Windblade attempts to destroy the Enigma but Optimus Prime intervenes.

episodes.title: The Duel
episodes.synopsis: Windblade confronts Optimus Prime over his defense of the Enigma. Meanwhile, the Council struggles to maintain order as more Combiners emerge across Cybertron.

episodes.title: Unforgotten
episodes.synopsis: Megatron emerges from exile and confronts Optimus Prime over the growing Combiner crisis. Old grudges surface as the two former enemies debate the future of Cybertron.

episodes.title: Homecoming
episodes.synopsis: Optimus Prime and Megatron form an uneasy alliance to deal with the Combiner threat. The Council's grip on power weakens as Starscream maneuvers behind the scenes.

episodes.title: A War of Giants
episodes.synopsis: Devastator demands the Enigma of Combination while Victorion battles him for the relic. Starscream seizes the Enigma, revealing that all events have been part of his long game to become the ultimate lifeform.

episodes.title: Darkest Hour
episodes.synopsis: Starscream, now fused with the Combiners as the monstrous Ultimate Starscream, threatens to destroy all of Cybertron. The surviving Transformers scramble for a way to stop him.

episodes.title: Destruction's Dawn
episodes.synopsis: Windblade takes control of the Titan Metroplex to immobilize Ultimate Starscream, allowing Optimus and Megatron to defeat him. The Enigma is entrusted to Victorion, and Windblade warns that the Titans have returned.

facts: Combiner Wars was the first installment of the Prime Wars Trilogy, co-produced by Machinima and Hasbro Studios with animation by Tatsunoko Production.
The series was created by Eric S. Calderon, George Krstic, and F.J. DeSanto, with voice work handled by Bang Zoom! Entertainment.
Each episode was approximately 5 minutes long, making it one of the shortest-form Transformers animated series ever produced.
Scripts were not finalized until January 2016, causing the August premiere to miss the peak of the Combiner Wars toyline it was meant to promote.
The series premiered on August 2, 2016 on Verizon's go90 platform in the United States and on Machinima's YouTube channel internationally.
After Machinima's closure in January 2019, the series was removed and later resurfaced on the Rooster Teeth website in March 2019.
The show was promoted as 'the Game of Thrones of animation' — a claim that drew significant skepticism and criticism from fans.
Despite heavy promotion, the series received devastatingly negative criticism from fans and critics for its low-framerate CGI, brief episode lengths, and stiff animation.
The animation style, using cel-shaded CGI, drew unfavorable comparisons to the earlier and widely panned Transformers: Energon series.
The series introduced Victorion, the first female Combiner in Transformers history, to animation.
